provenance_policy.rule: Only values directly read from the DWG bytes/tool output may use direct_dwg_* provenance. Filename, template, visual, or domain assumptions must be needs_review; missing geometry/dimensions are blockers.

family.note: Family label comes from the sample filename only, not from DWG entity inspection.

label_ko.note: Template label is based on the filename for UI selection and needs human review.

min.note: Draft width_mm minimum is a consultation template assumption, not directly extracted from this DWG.

max.note: Draft width_mm maximum is a consultation template assumption, not directly extracted from this DWG.

default.note: Draft width_mm default is a consultation template assumption, not directly extracted from this DWG.

min.note: Draft height_mm minimum is a consultation template assumption, not directly extracted from this DWG.

max.note: Draft height_mm maximum is a consultation template assumption, not directly extracted from this DWG.

default.note: Draft height_mm default is a consultation template assumption, not directly extracted from this DWG.

min.note: Draft depth_mm minimum is a consultation template assumption, not directly extracted from this DWG.

max.note: Draft depth_mm maximum is a consultation template assumption, not directly extracted from this DWG.

default.note: Draft depth_mm default is a consultation template assumption, not directly extracted from this DWG.

installation.note: Installation options are draft consultation choices and were not directly extracted from DWG.

doors.note: Door behavior is a draft rule placeholder and was not directly extracted from DWG.

sliding.note: Sliding behavior is inferred from family/filename and needs review.

reasons: Draft constraints and options are not mechanically certain.
No DWG entity geometry/text/layer extraction is available for this template.
Safe for consultation-grade 2D schematic MVP only; not production CAD.
